5003a00000A1B2C.Subject: Invalid credentials after password reset
5003a00000A1B2C.Description: Hi support team. I reset my password yesterday using the link in the email. The new password works fine on the mobile app, but when I try to log in on Chrome on my work laptop, I keep getting 'Invalid credentials'. I have tried the new password at least 10 times and I am sure it is correct. This is blocking me from accessing my reports. Please help, I have a board meeting Thursday.

5003a00000A1B2D.Subject: MFA code never arrives
5003a00000A1B2D.Description: I am trying to log in but the verification code text message never arrives. I have clicked Resend Code 4 times. I am on the corporate WiFi at our HQ. I tried switching to my iPhone hotspot and it still does not work.

5003a00000A1B2E.Subject: Locked out of account
5003a00000A1B2E.Description: I forgot my password and tried a few times before giving up. Now I see 'Your account has been temporarily locked'. How long do I have to wait? I have a customer escalation I need to respond to right now.

5003a00000A1B2F.Subject: Safari keeps logging me out
5003a00000A1B2F.Description: Every time I switch tabs in Safari I get logged out and have to sign in again. It only happens on my MacBook in Safari. Chrome on the same laptop is fine. This started last week after I updated to macOS Sequoia.

5003a00000A1B30.Subject: Cannot SSO from VPN
5003a00000A1B30.Description: When I am connected to the corporate VPN I can't log in. I get an error AADSTS50105. If I disconnect VPN, SSO works fine. I need VPN for our internal apps so this is a problem.

5003a00000A1B31.Subject: Need a refund for our annual subscription
5003a00000A1B31.Description: We were charged for our renewal yesterday but we cancelled in March. We need a full refund of $48,000 processed back to our card. Please confirm the timeline.
